FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Geopolitical Risks and Fed Policy Divergence Drive Dollar-Yen Rally
tldr_points: Geopolitical risks revive USD/JPY demand amid Iran tensions
Fed's dovish tilt clashes with BoJ's potential easing
Technical resistance breaks align with bullish multi-asset backdrop
FX.excerpt: Geopolitical tensions and Fed-BOJ policy divergence fuel USD/JPY upside; near-term break of 152.50 confirms bullish bias.
FX.comment: Geopolitical tensions and Fed-BOJ policy divergence fuel USD/JPY upside; near-term break of 152.50 confirms bullish bias.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Optimism and Dividend Stability Underpin Technical Bounce
tldr_points: AI-driven sector rotation into quality names
Strong dividend resilience amid macro uncertainty
Technical setup favors MA20 retest on RSI stabilization
STOCKS.excerpt: AI optimism and dividend stability underpin S&P 500 technical bounce toward MA20.
STOCKS.comment: AI optimism and dividend resilience support a retest of MA20 with controlled risk.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Tokenization Catalysts Offset Regulatory Friction Near MA20
tldr_points: JPMorgan tokenization thesis tilts long-term demand curve rightward despite multi-year rollout horizon
Brazil/Kalshi-Polymarket clampdown introduces tactical headline volatility but reinforces BTC’s non-custodial relative value
L1/L2 recovery coordination (Arbitrum $71M ETH unfreeze) stabilizes cross-chain collateral and supports BTC as pristine collateral proxy
CRYPTO.excerpt: Macro liquidity and tokenization tailwinds outweigh near-term regulatory noise, underpinning a measured rebound toward MA20 with BTC as the liquidity magnet.
CRYPTO.comment: Structural demand from tokenization and cross-chain collateral normalization outweighs episodic regulatory drag, favoring reversion toward MA20.
